name: Beans Spinach
recipeInstructions:
1. The night before, thaw the frozen spinach in the refrigerator.
2. Soak the beans overnight and cook them with a bay leaf until tender. This took about 1-3/4 hours after a 2-hour soaking following a brief boil.
3. Drain the beans, leaving some cooking liquid reserved if needed.
4. Make bread crumbs by tearing two slices of white (or whole wheat) bread into pieces and whirling in a Cuisinart until crumbly. Add garlic cloves and pulse until combined.
5. In a pan, heat spinach until hot, then add salt, white pepper, oregano, thyme. Mix well and puree.
6. Combine the crumbs, 1/3 cup of spinach puree, reserved cooking liquid, and seasonings in a large bowl. Mix thoroughly to avoid over-tasting.
7. Refrigerate overnight.
8. Before serving, gently warm the dish. It can also be served cold if desired.
